stories.headline: Strong Earthquake off Mexico's Coast Triggers and Lifts Tsunami Alert
stories.summary: A powerful 7.3 magnitude earthquake struck off the coast of Chiapas, Mexico, felt across Guatemala and El Salvador. Initial tsunami warnings were issued but later lifted, with no significant damage or casualties reported.

articles.title: Strong quake off Mexican coast rattles Guatemala and El Salvador, but leaves no damage
Μεξικό: Άρση συναγερμού για τσουνάμι μετά τον σεισμό 7,4 βαθμών

stories.headline: US Considers Escalation Against Iran, Boosts Military Presence in Israel Amid Regional Tensions
stories.summary: The US is reportedly considering expanded military action against Iran, including potential strikes on critical infrastructure, as dozens of American refueling aircraft are being sent to Israel. This comes as Iranian Revolutionary Guards fired upon a commercial vessel in the Strait of Hormuz, further escalating regional tensions.

articles.title: Ιράν: Οι Φρουροί της Επανάστασης άνοιξαν πυρ εναντίον πλοίου στα Στενά του Ορμούζ
Axios: Ο Τραμπ εξετάζει κλιμάκωση κατά του Ιράν – Δεκάδες αμερικανικά αεροσκάφη στέλνονται στο Ισραήλ

stories.headline: Video Evidence Released in Assassination Attempt on Cypriot Oligarch Vadim Yermolayev
stories.summary: Ukrainian authorities released surveillance footage showing the assassination attempt on Cypriot oligarch Vadim Yermolayev and his family in Monaco. The video, originally recorded by the perpetrators, was recovered by Ukrainian security services and is being used in the ongoing investigation.

articles.title: Βίντεο-ντοκουμέντο από την απόπειρα δολοφονίας του «Κύπριου» ολιγάρχη Γερμολάγιεφ – Οι δράστες κατέγραψαν την επίθεση για να επιβεβαιώσουν την εκτέλεση

stories.headline: TRNC Council of Ministers Approves Citizenship for 131 Individuals
stories.summary: The Council of Ministers in the Turkish Republic of Northern Cyprus has granted citizenship to 131 individuals who met the criteria under the Citizenship Law. This decision was announced following a cabinet meeting.

articles.title: Bakanlar Kurulu'ndan 131 kişiye vatandaşlık

stories.headline: President Christodoulides Announces New Developments in the Isaac and Solomou Cases
stories.summary: Republic of Cyprus President Nikos Christodoulides stated that there are new developments regarding the cases of Tasos Isaac and Solomos Solomou, who were killed in the UN buffer zone near Deryneia in 1996. The details of these developments were not immediately disclosed.

articles.title: Hristodulidis: İsak ve Solomu dosyasında yeni gelişmeler var

stories.headline: Esen Beyköylü Elected New Mayor of Yeniboğaziçi After Predecessor's Arrest
stories.summary: Following the arrest and imprisonment of Yeniboğaziçi Mayor Katip Demir, the Municipal Council elected Esen Beyköylü as the new mayor. The election took place after the unexpected vacancy in the mayoral office.

articles.title: Yeniboğaziçi Belediyesi'nde yeni başkan Esen Beyköylü oldu

stories.headline: UBP Proposes Holding Local and Early General Elections Concurrently, Causing Coalition Strain
stories.summary: The Central Executive Board of the National Unity Party (UBP) has put forth a proposal to hold both local and early general elections simultaneously. This suggestion has reportedly led to significant rifts within the ruling coalition.

articles.title: UBP MYK'dan "iki seçim birlikte" önerisi

stories.headline: Israeli Airstrikes Kill Palestinians Attending Funeral in Gaza, drawing Hamas Condemnation
stories.summary: An Israeli airstrike killed at least eight Palestinians and wounded 20 at a funeral in Nuseirat, Gaza, for a victim of an earlier strike. Hamas condemned the attack as a "brutal massacre," while the Israeli military claimed it targeted Islamic Jihad militants and was "aware of claims that several uninvolved individuals were harmed."

articles.title: Israeli strikes kill Palestinians attending Gaza funeral for earlier strike victim

stories.headline: Marvel Comics Relocates Publishing Operations to California, Names New Editor-in-Chief
stories.summary: Marvel Comics is moving its publishing division from New York City to Burbank, California, ending a nearly 90-year presence in New York. The move aligns the comics division more closely with Marvel Studios and parent company Disney's entertainment operations and includes a leadership change with Stephen Wacker named editor-in-chief.

articles.title: Marvel Comics to move publishing operations to California, report says

stories.headline: Over 100 Homes Destroyed by Fire in Southern Norway Amid Strong Winds
stories.summary: A large fire near Drammen, southern Norway, destroyed more than 100 homes as firefighters struggled against strong winds. Hundreds were evacuated, but no casualties or missing persons were reported from the blaze.

articles.title: More than 100 homes destroyed in Norway fire

stories.headline: SpaceX Targets New Starship Launch Date After Aborted Attempt, Shares Decline
stories.summary: SpaceX is planning another Starship launch attempt for next week after a last-second abort during engine ignition, which led to a significant drop in the company's market value. Engineers are replacing two engines to ensure a successful flight for the 13th test.

articles.title: SpaceX targets next week for another Starship launch attempt as shares slide on abort

stories.headline: Masterplan Initiated for Complete Regeneration of Pegeia's Traditional Core
stories.summary: A comprehensive Masterplan is being developed for the total regeneration and revitalization of the traditional core of Pegeia, Akamas Municipality. The €250,000 contract for studies and supervision was signed, with the overall project estimated to cost around €5.5 million, aiming to respect the area's architectural identity and cultural heritage.

articles.title: Εκπονούν masteplan για την ολική ανάπλαση του παραδοσιακού πυρήνα της Πέγειας

stories.headline: Casualties Reported in Ukraine and Russia Due to Recent Attacks
stories.summary: At least 10 people were killed and many injured in a series of attacks across Ukraine and Russia. Russian missile strikes hit Odesa, causing fatalities and injuries, while drone attacks affected Mykolaiv, Kherson, and the Russian region of Belgorod, resulting in further casualties and damage.

articles.title: Πόλεμος στην Ουκρανία: Τουλάχιστον 10 νεκροί και πολλοί τραυματίες εξαιτίας επιθέσεων

stories.headline: Successful Theatrical Performance "Our Neighbors'" Held in Droushia
stories.summary: The theatrical performance "Our Neighbors'" was presented with great success in Droushia. This local cultural event drew positive reception from the community.

articles.title: Με μεγάλη επιτυχία η θεατρική παράσταση «Τα δικά μας του γείτονού μας» στη Δρούσεια

stories.headline: Agia Marina Festival Celebrations Conclude with Grandeur in Agia Marina Chrysochous
stories.summary: The celebrations for Agia Marina in Agia Marina Chrysochous concluded with splendor and reverence. The event marked a significant religious and cultural occasion for the local community.

articles.title: Με λαμπρότητα και κατάνυξη ολοκληρώθηκαν οι εορτασμοί της Αγίας Μαρίνας στην Αγία Μαρίνα Χρυσοχούς

stories.headline: Palestinian Ambassador to Cyprus Alleges "Shock Plan" for Crocodile Moats Around Israeli Prisons
stories.summary: The Palestinian Ambassador to Cyprus made a shocking claim, stating that there is a "shock plan" by Israel to implement moats filled with crocodiles around Israeli prisons. This accusation was highlighted as a disturbing development.

articles.title: Παλαιστίνιος Πρέσβης στην Κύπρο: «Σχέδιο-σοκ για τάφρους με κροκόδειλους γύρω από ισραηλινές φυλακές»

stories.headline: Animal Abuse Complaints in Lakatamia Unresolved for Two Years, Ecologists Call for Action
stories.summary: The Ecologists' Movement has reported serious animal abuse incidents, including cats and dogs being shot on rooftops in Lakatamia, with complaints remaining unresolved for two years. They are urging authorities to take immediate action to investigate and address these issues.

articles.title: Δύο χρόνια καταγγελίες χωρίς αποτέλεσμα – Πυροβολούν γατιά και σκυλιά σε ταράτσα

stories.headline: €3 Fee Fails to Deter Cypriot Online Shoppers from Temu and Shein
stories.summary: Despite the implementation of a €3 fee per product category, Cypriot consumers continue to make large volumes of online purchases from popular platforms like Temu and Shein. This trend has generated over one million euros in state revenue within the first few months.

articles.title: Τα €3 δεν έβαλαν «φρένο» στις παραγγελίες – Τα στοιχεία που προκαλούν εντύπωση – «Βροχή» παραγγελιών από Temu και Shein

stories.headline: Parasite in Fast Food Lettuce Linked to Intestinal Outbreak in US
stories.summary: US health authorities have identified a parasite found in lettuce sold by the fast-food chain Taco Bell as the cause of an ongoing intestinal illness epidemic in the country. A federal investigation is underway to address the widespread outbreak.

articles.title: Παράσιτο που εντοπίστηκε στο μαρούλι πασίγνωστης αλυσίδας fast food υπεύθυνο για εντερική επιδημία

stories.headline: Omonia Nicosia Signs French Forward Lois Diony
stories.summary: French forward Lois Diony, 33, has signed with Omonia Nicosia after successfully completing medical examinations in Cyprus. Coach Henning Berg reportedly specifically sought Diony, believing he is a perfect fit for the team's playing style.

articles.title: Έσκασε ανακοίνωση για Ντιονί / Έφερε αυτόν που ήθελε ο Μπεργκ

stories.headline: TRNC Transport Minister Criticized for Comments on Ancient Port Jetty
stories.summary: TRNC Transport Minister Erhan Arıklı faced criticism from Faik Gencer for his remarks to Yeniduzen, stating that UBP was the responsible party concerning the Ancient Port jetty issue. Gencer questioned Arıklı's position if he was not taking responsibility.

articles.title: “O zaman o makamda niye oturuyorsun?”
